description: Composition Red kurta made of a blended fabric, has a scooped neckline, lace at the nape of the neckline, long sleeves with lace on the cuffs, mock chest placket with buttons, lace and pin tucks, and vertical stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
